item.title: Email Manager blueprint YAML
item.intent: Deliver the Email Manager blueprint as the reference implementation — email triage, calendar, tasks, cron, hardened security. This is the demo-ready first use case.
item.description: HIGH VALUE: THE first use case — this is what we show in demos. Defines Email Manager end-to-end: email + calendar + tasks tools, email-digest + morning-brief skills, 15min inbox cron, 8am daily digest. Acceptance: clawhq blueprint preview email-manager shows complete design; forge from CQ-010 produces valid openclaw.json. Must pair with CQ-022 (email-digest skill).
steps: Define Email Manager blueprint YAML with email + calendar + tasks tools
Configure email-digest and morning-brief skills in blueprint
Set up 15min inbox cron and 8am daily digest schedule
Apply hardened security posture with minimal egress allowlist
acceptanceCriteria: 'clawhq blueprint preview email-manager' shows complete design
Forge via init wizard produces valid openclaw.json
Blueprint defines all tools, skills, cron schedules, and security settings
Blueprint pairs correctly with email-digest skill (CQ-022)
